title: MUXHEL 30pcs S Hooks for Hanging, 15cm S Shaped Hooks Heavy Duty Black S Hookss Large Rubber Coated Metal Non Slip S Hook for Kitchen, Utensils, Pots, Pans, Clothes
features: 【Premium Quality】- Our s hooks are made of high-quality metal steel and can hang heavier items without being easily deformed. The surface is vinyl coated, sturdy and safe. Rust-proof and smooth surface, no need to worry about scratching scarves or clothes when using

【Anti-fall Design】- Our rubber coated s hooks for hanging are coated with vinyl rubber and have rubber plugs at the ends of the small openings to prevent rust, falling and sliding. These rubber wardrobe hooks won't fall off when you take out your items

【Size】- The length of metal s hooks heavy duty is about 15cm/6 inches; large open end: 6.35cm/2.5in, small open end: 3.3cm/1.29in. These S hooks with big and small ends can meet poles of different widths and can be used flexibly

【Easy to Use】- The black rubber-coated S shaped hooks hang easily from existing objects without the use of tools, nails, screws or adhesives. Large vinyl-coated hooks can hang a large number of items, helping you save more space in your home

【Multiple Uses】- Closet S Hooks for Hanging are compatible with most metal, wire, baskets, bins, wood and plastic shelves and crates to hang your items from closet rods, garages, mud rooms, offices, pantries, laundry in rooms and kitchens, and even outdoors
description: Product Description MUXHEL 30PCS S Hooks Heavy Duty 15cm Large Balck Rubber Coated S Shaped Hanging Hook for Utensils Bathroom Bedroom Office FEATURES -Premium Quality : Our heavy-duty S hooks are made of high-quality metal steel and can hang heavier items without being easily deformed. -Anti-fall Design : Our rubber coated s hooks are coated with vinyl rubber and have rubber plugs at the ends of the small openings to prevent rust, falling and sliding. -Size : The length of metal s hooks is about 15cm/6 inches; large open end: 6.35cm/2.5in, small open end: 3.3cm/1.29in. -Easy to Use : The black rubber-coated shaped hooks hang easily from existing objects without the use of tools, nails, screws or adhesives. SPECIFICATION Main Material : Metal Color : Black Product Dimensions : 15 cm Quantity : 30pcs Anti-slip Design Vinyl Coated Strong Load-bearing Capacity
